zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria de Graham於大約1190年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾艾斯達爾 迪斯特利可特時，她的父親William de Graham47歲，母親Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn49歲。她於1216年與Roger de Avenel在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1257年在她的家鄉享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria de Graham was born about 1190, in Eskdale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William de Graham, was 47 and her mother, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, was 49. She married Roger de Avenel in 1216, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1257, in her hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria de Graham est née environ 1190, à Eskdale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Graham, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Avenel en 1216, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1257, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria de Grahamが約1190年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアエスクダル ディストリクトで生まれた時，父William de Grahamは47歳，母Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearnは49歳であった。1216年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでRoger de Avenelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1257年に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria de Graham(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 스k데일 디스트릭트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Graham(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1216년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 Roger de Avenel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1257년 그녀의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria de Graham родилась около 1190 г. в местности эскдеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Graham было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Avenel в 1216 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1257 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.
